item.name: Ame-zaiku Set
item.description:
Candy kneaded into a variety of intricate shapes by a Doman artisan.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Spell Speed Bonus: +4% (Max 12)
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 8)
Gear Durability Bonus: +2
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
